message:

# Get exact synthesis cell count from new synthesis
grep "Chip area\|of which used for" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/77-yosys-synthesis/yosys-synthesis.log | tail -5

# What is the last overflow value from GPL?
grep "overflow\|Overflow" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/99-openroad-globalplacement/openroad-globalplacement.log 2>/dev/null | tail -5` executed with exit code 0.
